# Fried UI

> Beautiful, accessible React components with zero runtime styling.

## Docs

- [Badge](/llm/badge.md): Display-only label with 20 variants (solid, soft, colored outline)
- [Button](/llm/button.md): Accessible button with golden ratio spacing, React Aria keyboard/focus/screen reader support
- [Surface](/llm/surface.md): Visual layer for cards and panels with bordered, glass, primary variants

## Optional
